---
name: 🆕 Propose a New Document
about: Suggest a brand new policy, procedure, or guideline we should add.
title: '[NEW] '
labels: enhancement, new-document
assignees: ''
---

**What type of document are you proposing?**
- [ ] Policy (High-level rule)
- [ ] Procedure (Step-by-step instructions)
- [ ] Standard (Mandatory technical baseline)
- [ ] Guideline (Best practice/recommendation)

**What is the goal of this document?**
Please provide a clear and concise description of why Study GRC needs this document. (e.g., "With the rise of ChatGPT, we need a baseline policy on how employees can safely use Generative AI.")

**Does this align with a specific compliance framework?**
If this document helps satisfy a specific requirement, let us know! (e.g., SOC 2 CC6.1, ISO 27001 A.8.1.1, NIST CSF, etc.)

**Would you be willing to write the first Draft?**
- [ ] Yes! I'll open a Pull Request once this is discussed.
- [ ] No, I'm just requesting it for someone else to write.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, references, or links to examples here. 

💬 *Want to debate this idea before we make it official? Come chat with us in the [Study GRC Discord Server](https://discord.studygrc.org)!*
